analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet highlights EU-UN cooperation to promote peace, security, peacekeeping, and crisis management, framed as serving both EU and global interests. Evaluation: EU1 (EU as a successful story) – not directly; no historical reflection or overcoming obstacles. EU2 (EU is united) – not about intra-EU unity or agreement among member states. EU3 (useful for its citizens within the EU) – focus is external/global, not internal citizen benefits. EU4 (avant-garde actor) – no claim of pioneering regulation or leadership in future challenges. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – mentions peace and security broadly, but not specifically democracy/human rights leadership. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – yes; explicitly emphasizes EU’s role in global peace, security, multilateral cooperation with the UN, and crisis management benefiting the world. Conclusion: Only EU6 applies.
